sourceOverview.notes: Fast inference for open models. Hosts some audio models. Multimodal support.

audit.priceRangeSummary: STT examples: Whisper-v3-large ~$0.0015/audio min; turbo ~$0.0009/audio min; diarization +40%; batch discount ~40%. LLM prices vary by model.
audit.limitsSummary: Transcriptions API max file size ~1 GB and no duration limit. Public native TTS was not verified from official docs reviewed.
audit.regionSummary: Fireworks cloud; region specifics are not heavily surfaced publicly.
audit.freeTierSummary: Free/test usage may exist by account plan; verify current dashboard policy.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: The input sheet overstates TTS support based on official docs reviewed. Treat Fireworks as LLM + STT unless you verify a newer TTS endpoint live.

supplementalResearch.title: 27. Fireworks AI (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 27. Fireworks AI (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✓

**Status:** Active. Fast inference. $1 free credit. OpenAI-compatible. SOC 2, HIPAA, GDPR.

STT: Whisper v3 ($0.0015/min), Whisper v3 Turbo ($0.0009/min). Streaming STT with ~300ms latency via WebSocket. TTS: proprietary model (40 voices) + Kokoro (48 voices, 8 languages). Voice Agent Platform: ASR + LLM + TTS in <500ms. $4B valuation.
